title: Hold together a three-bloc procurement coalition
description: Three procurement blocs can form binding coalitions and transfer value. Bloc A controls demand, Bloc B controls logistics, and Bloc C controls political approval. I need to keep the grand coalition stable and allocate gains fairly enough to prevent defection.

evidenceContext.label: Demand leverage
evidenceContext.detail: Bloc A controls the largest volume commitment

evidenceContext.label: Logistics leverage
evidenceContext.detail: Bloc B controls the export and fulfillment corridor

evidenceContext.label: Approval leverage
evidenceContext.detail: Bloc C controls the required approval pathway
